nasb.text: The king of Israel said to Jehoshaphat, “I will disguise myself and go into battle, but you put on your robes.” So the king of Israel disguised himself, and they went into battle.

esv.text: And the king of Israel said to Jehoshaphat, “I will disguise myself and go into battle, but you wear your robes.” And the king of Israel disguised himself, and they went into battle.

cnv.text: 以色列王對約沙法說：“我要改裝上陣，你可以仍穿朝服。”於是以色列王改了裝，他們就上陣去了。

ccb.text: 以色列王对约沙法说：“我要改装上阵，你就穿王袍吧。”以色列王改装后，他们就上阵去了。
